name: iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bond ETF
whatItOwns: Seeks to track the investment results of an index composed of U.S. Treasury bonds with remaining maturities less than or equal to three months.
whatPaysIt: Treasury coupon income and bill yield
whatHurtsIt: rate-path changes, low carry, and opportunity cost
failureMode: capital stays available but payout stays low and may lag risk assets
selectorLabel: SGOV — iShares 0-3 Month Treasury Bond ETF
whySelected: Selected because it expresses the white job in a backend-free local roster and gives Wave-I a concrete selector candidate for that bucket.
whyNotOtherBucket: Not classified as Blue because the main job is reserve capital and immediate deployability, not carry step-up.
doctrineNotes: Workbook bucket: White / Blue. Wave-I active bucket projection: WHITE.
provenanceNotes: Seeded from uploaded workbook content(1).xlsx and quarantined Block-3 backend-free matrix doctrine.
